headline: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) Expands Equity Research Coverage, Is The Stock Getting Pricey?
summary: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) drew attention after subsidiary Huntington Securities launched an equity research platform for Huntington Capital Markets clients, initially covering REITs and Utilities with two senior analysts leading the effort. See our latest analysis for Huntington Bancshares. At a share price of $17.85, Huntington Bancshares has drifted slightly over the past week but still shows positive momentum, with a 30-day share price return of 1.88% and a 90-day share price return of...
